OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Robert S. Aaron of Aaron & Wilson LLP (415-438-7801) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Stanford Kramer

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT STANFORD KRAMER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is granted. Kramer is entitled to have the default vacated under both the mandatory and permissive relief provisions of CCP 473(b), The relief sought by Kramer is strongly supported by California's policy of deciding cases on their merits. Court grants 10 days leave to answer. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Continued To Dec-28-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
